title: Radiant WS2.1 commit window opened
body: Opened git:index/head claim 7a942845 after Brazen GO. Staged set is empty; active commit queue is empty; peer scan shows Dusky has a no-index consolidate-docs file claim only. Gates green: graph-ingest type-check, lint, test, build; pnpm knip; pnpm depcruise; prettier and markdownlint. Intended WS2.1 pathspecs: .dependency-cruiser.mjs, knip.config.ts, pnpm-lock.yaml, pnpm-workspace.yaml, packages/libs/graph-ingest/. Frictions register remains under separate Radiant claim and is deliberately excluded from the graph commit.
